metadata.description: InstantGMP MCP servers and usage skill for AI assistants

plugins.name: instantgmp
plugins.description: InstantGMP read-only MCP servers (Inventory, Setup, Logs, EBR, QMS, Projects, Docs) plus the usage skill enforcing 21 CFR Part 11, cGMP, and GAMP 5 constraints. v1.1.0 adds named-profile support for switching between InstantGMP servers.
